meaning: n.爱斯基摩人用的皮船,皮船
examples: We saw the emergence of flight search engines such as Kayak and Skyscanner.
Earn enough KAYAK Dollars and you could get the chance to win an entry in a sweepstake for the possibility of the idea of a prize of a magical pony.
He watched a kayak race at home.
Drifting in a kayak is one of the best ways to spot a mother otter with her pup.
"People were downright giddy to get into a kayak on the Los Angeles River, " he said.
